title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0145 33 Brockworth Crescent, Stapleton, Bristol, BS16 1HQ
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Lodgeway Properties Ltd  Site address:  33 Brockworth Crescent, Stapleton, Bristol, BS16 1HQ  Description of proposed development:  Change of use of existing small house in multiple occupation (use class C4) to a large house in multiple occupation for up to 8no occupants (sui generis), with associated cycle storage.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 5 January 2026   Date by when representations must be made 6 February 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 2 March 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 6 February 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0145 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     4455.PL.01A Site Location Plan  (PDF, 147 KB, 1 page)  4455.PL.02B Block Plans  (PDF, 2.3 MB, 1 page)  4455.PL.03B Existing House Plans  (PDF, 540 KB, 1 page)  4455.PL.04A Existing House Elevations  (PDF, 302 KB, 1 page)  4455.PL.05B Existing Outbuilding  (PDF, 498 KB, 1 page)  4455.PL.06B Proposed House Plans  (PDF, 524 KB, 1 page)  4455.PL.08B Proposed Outbuilding  (PDF, 500 KB, 1 page)  Application Form Completed  (PDF, 1.77 MB, 14 pages)  BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 260 KB, 3 pages)  CIL Form 1  (PDF, 790 KB, 6 pages)  S62A Cover Ltr PR01882  (PDF, 3.08 MB, 30 pages)   Questionnaire and supporting documents  Comments  Consultees  Interested Parties  Planning Inspectorate Correspondence  Applicant Correspondence "
